text: Surrounded by glass, metal, and words on vivid walls, I feel both out of place and deeply fascinated. Questions about the nature and goal of research—expressed in the artwork and technology displays—arise within me. I experience a sense of anticipation, as if I am on the threshold of new knowledge, yet the emptiness of the room and the harshness of the lighting make me slightly uneasy, amplifying my awareness of myself as both observer and participant in this evolving space.
